Piece of Cake: You are not allowed to castle this game.
Your King must move on move 2 (Bongcloud).
You cannot capture any pawns for the first 10 moves.
Doughnut Elo: Start the game without your Queenside Knight.
You must play the entire game with exactly half the time on your clock as your opponent.
Every time your opponent checks you, you must drop a pawn.
Pinned Down: Start the game without your Queen.
You are not allowed to move your pawns past the 4th rank.
If you move a piece backward, you automatically lose your turn.
Challenge: Start the game without your Queen AND your Kingside Rook.
You must play blindfolded while your opponent plays normally.
You must announce checkmate 5 moves in advance. If you miss it, you resign.
